# Ehsanul Haque Siam - AI Engineer · Full-Stack Developer · LLM Engineer

> Personal portfolio of Ehsanul Haque Siam, an AI Engineer, Full-Stack Developer & LLM Engineer from Dhaka, Bangladesh. Lead Developer at BetaScript LLC, AI Engineering Intern at Unies, published researcher, and open source contributor.

## About

Ehsanul Haque Siam is an AI Engineer, Full-Stack Developer & LLM Engineer. He shipped 4 production React websites generating 1.5x revenue growth as Lead Developer at BetaScript LLC. Built RAG pipelines with high retrieval accuracy using Pinecone and LangChain during AI internship at Unies. Published researcher in medical AI (Taylor & Francis) with 3x Dean's List at AIUB.

He has published research in medical AI — specifically "Beyond NER: A Comparative Benchmark of Medical BERTs for Multi-Label Adverse Drug Reaction Classification" at IDAA 2025, published as a Taylor & Francis Book Chapter. His work involves fine-tuning domain-specific BERT models (BioBERT, PubMedBERT) for healthcare applications. He also has a paper accepted at IEEE QPAIN 2026 on clustering-based topic modeling.

Contact: ehsanul.siamdev@gmail.com
Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh
Website: https://ehsanulhaquesiam.netlify.app/
Hiring Page: https://ehsanulhaquesiam.netlify.app/hire-me.html
GitHub: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/EhsanulHaqueSiam/

## Hiring Information

- Open to: AI Engineer, LLM Engineer, Full-Stack Engineer roles
- Engagement types: Full-time, contract, and project-based
- Collaboration: Remote-friendly, works with international teams
- Recruiter contact: ehsanul.siamdev@gmail.com

## Technical Skills

### AI & Machine Learning
- Machine Learning (Advanced), NLP (Advanced), Scikit-learn (Advanced)
- TensorFlow (Intermediate), PyTorch (Intermediate)
- LLMs & BERT (Advanced), RAG Pipelines (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Pinecone, ChromaDB)
- Computer Vision (Intermediate)

### Programming Languages
- Java (Expert), Python (Advanced), C++ (Advanced)
- Kotlin (Intermediate), C# (Intermediate), TypeScript (Intermediate), SQL (Advanced)

- React 19 (Advanced), TanStack Start/Router (Advanced), TailwindCSS (Advanced)
- Framer Motion (Advanced), Vite (Advanced), Zustand (Advanced)

- MySQL (Expert), SQLite (Advanced), JDBC (Expert), SQL Server (Intermediate)

- Android SDK (Advanced), MVVM Architecture (Advanced), Retrofit (Advanced)

- Git (Expert), GitHub (Expert), Linux (Advanced), Docker (Intermediate), Jupyter (Advanced)

## Featured Projects

### Indian Claypit - Restaurant Website
Developed a restaurant platform serving 50,000+ customers with a 4.9★ rating from 2,847 reviews by building a full-stack React application with online ordering, event booking, and catering integration.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
URL: https://indianclaypit.com/

### BetaScript - Tech Agency Website
Launched a tech agency website for a BD-USA partnership serving 150+ clients with 100% satisfaction rate by designing an animated React application with service showcases, testimonials, and 24h response workflow.
Tech: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
URL: https://betascript.online/

### Aurum Gold - Gold E-commerce
Built a premium gold e-commerce platform with editorial-grade UX and live gold rate integration targeting Lighthouse 90+ performance scores by architecting with React 19, TanStack Router, Zustand, and cinematic Framer Motion animations.
Tech: React 19, TypeScript, TanStack Router, Zustand, TailwindCSS
URL: https://theaurum.netlify.app

### Void Threads - Streetwear E-commerce
Created a premium streetwear e-commerce platform with conversion-optimized UX featuring sales psychology patterns by building with React 19, TanStack Start, SSR via Nitro 3, and mobile-first responsive design from 320px to 1920px.
Tech: React 19, TypeScript, TanStack Start, Nitro 3, TailwindCSS
URL: https://voidthreadsco.netlify.app

### Student Management System
Reduced university data retrieval time from 50ms to 7ms — a 7x performance improvement by redesigning the database to 3NF normalization with Singleton connection pooling in Java. Earned 17 GitHub stars.
Tech: Java, MySQL, JDBC, Design Patterns
GitHub: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/StudentManagementSystem

### Spotify Sentiment Analysis
Classified sentiment of 52,702 Spotify reviews with 85-90% accuracy by building a 17-task ML pipeline with TF-IDF vectorization and Multinomial Naive Bayes.
Tech: Python, scikit-learn, NLP, TF-IDF, Naive Bayes
GitHub: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/spotify-review-sentiment

### BD News Scraper & Analytics
Automated daily scraping of 74+ Bangladeshi news sources with 82 spiders publishing a live Kaggle dataset updated daily via GitHub Actions by engineering a production pipeline with Scrapy, Playwright, ML-powered sentiment analysis, and Docker deployment.
Tech: Python, Scrapy, FastAPI, Docker, GitHub Actions
GitHub: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/BDNewsPaperScraper
Kaggle: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/ehsanulhaquesiam/bangladesh-news-articles

### Mario's Multiverse Adventure
Led a team of 5 to ship a 2D platformer with 3 unique levels and a physics engine earning 4 GitHub forks and a YouTube demo by building a custom rendering engine with OpenGL, SFML audio, and SQLite high scores in C++.
Tech: C++, OpenGL, SFML, SQLite, CMake
GitHub: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/MarioMultiverseAdventures

### Hotel Management System
Built a hotel operations platform with Bkash/Nagad payment integration earning 15 GitHub stars across 171 commits and 4 releases by developing a modular Java Swing application with secure authentication and admin/user dashboards.
Tech: Java, Swing, File I/O, OOP
GitHub: https://github.com/EhsanulHaqueSiam/HotelManagementSystem

## Publications

### Decoding Research Trends: A Clustering Based Topic Modeling Framework
- Conference: IEEE QPAIN 2026
- Status: Accepted (IEEE Xplore, Scopus Indexed)
- Topic: Proposed a clustering-based topic modeling framework for decoding research trends by developing novel clustering algorithms applied to academic publication data

### Beyond NER: Medical BERTs for Multi-Label ADR Classification
- Conference: International Conference on Intelligent Data Analysis and Applications (IDAA 2025)
- Published: Dec 2025, Taylor & Francis Book Chapter
- Topic: Benchmarked domain-specific Medical BERT models for multi-label adverse drug reaction classification demonstrating improved performance over general BERT on the PsyTAR dataset

### Unfolding Emerging Issues in the Context of Changing Climatic Scenario
- Conference: 2nd South Asian Conference on Climate
- Date: Sep 2024
- Topic: Presented statistical analysis of emerging climate issues to an international audience contributing to South Asian regional understanding of environmental trends

- 3x Dean's List Awards at AIUB (CGPA 3.95, 3.89, 3.75+) — maintained top performance while building 15+ projects and publishing research
- 1st Runner Up - AIUB CS FEST 2024 (App Showcase, competing against 20+ teams evaluated by industry judges)
- 60+ GitHub Stars across 26 open source repositories — top project earning 17 stars and 8 forks
- Published researcher at Taylor & Francis and IEEE
